description: Evaluations for self-learning-feedback skill using ANALYSIS SWARM 3-persona pattern

evals.prompt: Verify skill has all 4 modules: verify (RYAN), score (FLASH), learn (SOCRATES), improve (SYNTHESIS)
evals.expected_output: All 4 module files exist in modules/ directory

evals.prompt: Verify skill version matches project VERSION file (0.1.1), not template default (1.0.0)
Test verify module can detect version mismatch between VERSION file and test file
evals.expected_output: Verify script detects mismatch and reports it

evals.prompt: Test score module can score a markdown file for noise level
Test learn module can capture a lesson from a version mismatch error
evals.command: bash .agents/skills/self-learning-feedback/scripts/capture_lesson.sh --error-type version_mismatch --context test --evidence test --fix test --dry-run 2>/dev/null || test -f .agents/skills/self-learning-feedback/scripts/capture_lesson.sh

evals.prompt: Test improve module can synthesize RYAN, FLASH, SOCRATES inputs into fix recommendations
Use skill to fix the v1.0.0 → v0.1.1 version misalignment in the actual codebase
evals.expected_output: All v1.0.0 claims updated to v0.1.1, verification passes
